marketplace.title: MarketMe
marketplace.subtitle: Add tools to your workspace
marketplace.signInBanner: Sign in to activate tools and save your workspace.

forge.title: ForgeMe
forge.subtitle: Anomaly dataset generator and analyzer
forge.placeholder: e.g. temperature sensor readings from a manufacturing plant over one month
forge.analyzeSubtitle: Upload a CSV file to detect anomalies using IQR method
forge.dropzone: Drop CSV file here or click to upload
forge.apiError: Failed to connect to API. Make sure the backend is running.
forge.analyzeError: Failed to analyze file. Make sure it is a valid CSV.

analyze.dropzone: drop your CSV here or click to browse
analyze.privacyTitle: Your data never leaves your device
analyze.privacyBody: Analysis runs entirely in your browser using DuckDB-Wasm — a full SQL engine compiled to WebAssembly. No server, no uploads, no logs.
analyze.sizeWarning: Large file detected — analysis may take longer than usual.
analyze.errorNoHeaders: CSV file has no valid column headers.
analyze.errorMinRows: CSV file must have a header row and at least one data row.
analyze.errorJsonArray: JSON file must contain an array of objects (e.g. [{...}, {...}]).
analyze.errorEncoding: Could not read file. It may be corrupted or use an unsupported encoding (UTF-8 required).
